title: Multi-entity card & expense
text: Cards and expenses managed separately across many clinic or practice Xero/NetSuite files, with consolidated group-level reporting on top.

title: Card issuance & leaver management
text: Fast reissue for new starters, instant limit-to-zero for leavers, and rules handed to a covering colleague — no shared PINs.

title: Receipt capture & card-blocking
text: Cards lock without a timely receipt and unlock the moment one's submitted, making compliance self-enforcing across every site.

title: Accounts payable automation
text: OCR invoice capture, auto-coding rules, scheduled payment runs and purchase-order pre-approvals — built for high invoice volume across many small sites.

title: Subscription management
text: Visibility over recurring charges so subscriptions don't get orphaned on a shared card or an ex-staff member's card.

title: Reimbursements
text: Out-of-pocket and petty-cash-style spend covered for sites that don't have a card, without leaving the same approval and coding rules.

title: Dollar-threshold approval routing
text: Multi-level sign-off by dollar value across many small site-level budgets, so approvals scale with risk rather than headcount.
